EV Makers Are Determined To Dethrone Tesla In China
summary: EV sales in China surged in July. On Wednesday, the China Association of Automobile Manufacturers (CAAM) revealed that wholesale deliveries of new EVs that include battery-powered, plug-in hybrid and hydrogen fuel-cell cars rose 164% YoY last month. These 271,000 units imply that EVs made 10 percent of total auto sales in China from January to July.

headline: 5 Stocks Insiders Are Selling
summary: When insiders sell shares, it indicates their concern in the company’s prospects or that they view the stock as being overpriced. Either way, this signals an opportunity to go short on the stock. Insider sales should not be taken as the only indicator for making an investment or trading decision. At best, it can lend conviction to a selling decision.
